scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Partnerize surface (transactions, clicks, reporting exports, webhooks) is out of scope outside this connector's current declared surface

excluded.reason: not implemented as a stream because it introduces an additional resource family or request shape outside this connector's current sync scope
returns or manages file/download payloads rather than JSON records expressible by this connector bundle
mutation is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action for this connector's current write scope
